languages.text: "Я отправляюсь в поселение. Возможно, оттуда вокс-сигнал пробьется к флагману".
"I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."
languages.original_text: "Я отправляюсь в поселение. Возможно, оттуда вокс-сигнал пробьется к флагману".

traits.locale_text: "I am heading to the outpost. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."
"I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."
"We must reach the settlement — perhaps we can find a way back to the flagship from there."
"I am heading to the outpost. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."
"I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

languages.text: 「集落に辿り着かなければならない――そこから旗艦へ戻る手段が見つかるかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "We must reach the settlement — perhaps we can find a way back to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: 「集落に辿り着かなければならない――そこから旗艦へ戻る手段が見つかるかもしれない。」

languages.text: « Je me rends de ce pas à la colonie. Peut-être le signal-vox parviendra-t-il jusqu'au vaisseau amiral, de là-bas. »
languages.original_text: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: « Je me rends de ce pas à la colonie. Peut-être le signal-vox parviendra-t-il jusqu'au vaisseau amiral, de là-bas. »

languages.text: "Yerleşime gideceğim. Belki voks sinyali, oradan sancak gemisine ulaşabilir."
languages.original_text: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: "Yerleşime gideceğim. Belki voks sinyali, oradan sancak gemisine ulaşabilir."

languages.text: "Ich werde zur Siedlung gehen. Vielleicht kommt das Voxsignal von dort zum Flaggschiff durch."
languages.original_text: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde zur Siedlung gehen. Vielleicht kommt das Voxsignal von dort zum Flaggschiff durch."

languages.text: «Me dirijo al asentamiento. Quizá la nave insignia pueda captar nuestra señal de voco desde allí».
languages.original_text: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: «Me dirijo al asentamiento. Quizá la nave insignia pueda captar nuestra señal de voco desde allí».

languages.text: “我要前往定居点。也许那里的音阵信号能接通旗舰的通讯。”
languages.original_text: "I am heading to the settlement. Perhaps the vox-signal will break through to the flagship from there."

traits.locale_text: “我要前往定居点。也许那里的音阵信号能接通旗舰的通讯。”
